rationale: Educ. Code §29.162 governs commissioner rulemaking for prekindergarten programs. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 29.162. RULES. (a) The commissioner may adopt rules for this subchapter, including rules establishing full-day and half-day minutes of operation requirements as provided by Section 25.081.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns prekindergarten program rules, unrelated to homestead exemption.
